ground_truth.title: RESTAURANT Definition & Meaning | Dictionary.com
ground_truth.main_content: Definition: an establishment where meals are served to customers. A commercial establishment where meals are prepared and served to customers. Etymology: An Americanism first recorded in 1820-30; from French, noun use of present participle of restaurer, from Latin restaurare 'to restore, reestablish'.
